## Summary

Describe the change in a few lines. Focus on behaviour, not just files touched.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Include context or a linked issue if relevant.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:integration` (if API / worker / storage changed)
- [ ] Other checks:

## Docs and operational impact

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] `docs/` updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] No docs change needed
- [ ] Requires env/config changes
- [ ] Requires rollout coordination

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that would help review this quickly: tradeoffs, follow-ups, or known gaps.
